ddls:
CREATE TABLE "curriculum" (
  "curriculum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curriculum component */,
  "curriculum_name" TEXT /* Name of the curriculum */,
  "curriculum_description" TEXT /* Description of the curriculum */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number in the curriculum */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Date range for the week */,
  "theory_topics" TEXT /* Theory topics covered during the week */,
  "assignments" TEXT /* Assignments and activities for the week */,
  "deliverables" TEXT /* Deliverables expected from students during the week */,
  "evaluated_tasks" TEXT /* Evaluated tasks for the week */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the curriculum */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the curriculum was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the curriculum was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curriculum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "course_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "course_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "course_status" TEXT /* Status of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "ta_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teaching assistant for the course */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_ta_id FOREIGN KEY ("ta_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "instructor_title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "instructor_office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "instructor_office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "student_status" TEXT /* Status of the student */,
  "student_gpa" TEXT /* Grade point average of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the team is part of */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is working on */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "team_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the project */,
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "project_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment is part of */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the assessment is related to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being assessed */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment */,
  "assessment_score" TEXT /* Score of the assessment */,
  "assessment_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback for the assessment */,
  "assessment_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was created */,
  "assessment_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
